---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the need or pain point (the research/workflow context helps).

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches or existing tools you've tried.

**Additional context**
Datasets, platforms, or pipelines this relates to; screenshots/mockups if useful.
